description:
2018 Range Rover Vogue SE 5.0SC V8, 4WD, 525bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 149,000 or AED 2,344 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 74,067 KM - 12 Month Blackline Warranty - Full Service History - GCC specification (Al Tayer) - Price includes VAT 
 - Apple Car Play - Android Auto - 11.4" Touchscreen Infotainment - Meridian Surround Soundsystem - Ambient Lighting - 360° Camera - Front and Rear Parking Sensors - Lane Departure Assist - Blind Spot Monitor - Electric Tailgate - Electronically Adjustable Front Seats - Memory Function on Drivers Seat - Armrest Cool Box - 21" Alloys - Cruise Control - Navigation - Bluetooth Telephone - Bluetooth Audio - Auto Hold - Keyless Start - Keyless Entry
